public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as hostler.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a hostler still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of hostler in and around Verdant Alchemy, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Verdant Alchemy workable through the obligations of hostler while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Verdant Alchemy, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of hostler visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Corin March can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Corin March needs help with a problem in Verdant Alchemy that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Corin March carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Verdant Alchemy: the part of Verdant Alchemy where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
